message.content:
@startuml
actor Foo1
boundary Foo2
database Foo5
collections "I have a really\nlong name"
entity Foo4
control "Foo3()"

Foo1 -> Foo2 : To boundary
Foo1 -> "Foo3()" : To control
Foo1 -> Foo4 : To entity
Foo1 -> Foo5 : To database
Foo1 -> "I have a really\nlong name" : To collections
Foo1 <-- Foo1 : To actor
@enduml
